# Badger Grapple Red Engine v2.2

## Fixed
- Mobile controls no longer get stuck after opening and closing the menu.
- Replaced stale scene-specific phone handler with a dynamic top-active-scene router.
- Deployed JavaScript now loads from `src_v2_2/` to avoid iPhone/GitHub Pages cache keeping the old code.

## Verification
When deployed, the page note should say:
`Engine v2.2 input-router fix. Menu close restores phone controls.`
